name: frontier-analysis-skills
description: A flat collection of five frontier-model analysis skills — seam-conformance, layer-trace, contract-drift, boundary-judgment, and invariant-capture — for spending an expensive reasoning model well on any codebase. Each skill rides the same spine: gather cheap (no frontier tokens), think expensive (one focused reasoning call), capture durably (the verdict becomes a rule and a test, so you spend once and enforce forever). No agents, no shared docs — each skill stands alone and auto-routes on its own triggers.
